task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
build for javascript backend

owner is 'pm@acme.com'

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status, default 'active'
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status, default 'todo'
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# Custom register endpoint
when user sends registration to /api/register:
  validate registration:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  user = save registration to Users
  send back user with status 201

# Custom login endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  user = look up User with email is credentials's email
  guard user is not null or 'Invalid email or password'
  send back { id: user's id, email: user's email, token: 'fake-jwt-token' } with status 200

# Create a project
when user sends project to /api/projects:
  requires login
  validate project:
    name is text, required
  set project's owner_id to caller's id
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved with status 201

# Get all projects for the logged-in user
when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects where owner_id is caller's id
  send back projects

# Get a specific project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  send back project

# Update a project
when user sends changes to /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  set project's name to changes's name if changes's name is not empty
  set project's description to changes's description if changes's description is not empty
  set project's status to changes's status if changes's status is not empty
  save project to Projects
  send back project

# Delete a project
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  delete Project with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# Create a task in a project
when user sends task to /api/projects/:id/tasks:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  validate task:
    title is text, required
  set task's project_id to this id
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved with status 201

# Get all tasks for a project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id/tasks:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  tasks = get all Tasks where project_id is this id
  send back tasks

# Get a specific task
when user calls GET /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  send back task

# Update a task
when user sends changes to /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  set task's title to changes's title if changes's title is not empty
  set task's description to changes's description if changes's description is not empty
  set task's status to changes's status if changes's status is not empty
  set task's assignee_id to changes's assignee_id if changes's assignee_id is not empty
  save task to Tasks
  send back task

# Delete a task
when user calls DELETE /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  guard project's owner_id is caller's id or 'Not authorized'
  delete Task with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# Test blocks
test 'Register a new user':
  call POST /api/register with {'email': 'pm@test.com', 'password': 'pass1234', 'name': 'PM User'}
  expect response status 201

test 'Login with credentials':
  call POST /api/login with {'email': 'pm@test.com', 'password': 'pass1234'}
  expect response status 200

test 'Create a project':
  call POST /api/projects with {'name': 'Clear v2'}
  expect response status 201

test 'Get all projects':
  call GET /api/projects
  expect response status 200

test 'Get projects without auth':
  call GET /api/projects as anonymous
  expect response status 401
